title: Citrusy Flaky Japanese Manchego Crumble
description: A visually stunning vegetarian dish featuring flaky layers of Japanese manchego cheese topped with a citrusy, savory glaze and sprinkled with aromatic spices.
instructions: In a bowl, mix Japanese Manchego Cheese with olive oil until smooth.
Add orange zest and ginger powder to the cheese mixture. Mix well.
Sprinkle cinnamon and salt over the cheese mixture evenly.
Fold in sesame seeds into the cheese mixture using your hands or spatula.
Transfer the crumble mixture onto a greased baking dish (approximately 8x8 inches).
Bake for about 25 minutes until golden brown. Keep an eye on it to avoid burning.
While the crumble is in the oven, prepare mint leaves for garnish and orange slices as a side dish.
Serve hot with fresh mint leaves and orange slices.
Enjoy your visually stunning Citrusy Flaky Japanese Manchego Crumble!
